test: POST /api/v1/auth/login burst (after patching auth.py + rate_limiting.py from worktree)
expected: Rate limit fires after threshold (20 reqs/300s); 429 response body contains limit/window/retry_after
actual: 429 fired immediately on next request (carried-over bucket from prior session). Response body shape: {success:false, message:{error:'Rate limit exceeded', limit:20, window_seconds:300, remaining:0, retry_after:300}}
note: After hot-reloading the dev backend with the audit/monitoring-stack-phase1 versions of auth.py and rate_limiting.py, the @rate_limit decorator engages correctly. Original test (pre-patch) returned all 401/422 because decorator was not in the deployed image.
